title: Robion
description: Mixed intervals: threshold + anaerobic + VO2max in one workout

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/5. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 70%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 70%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 100% for 10:00. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 98-100% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 10:00 at 98-100%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/5. 1:00 at 140%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 140% for 1:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 1:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/5. Power: 130-140%, Cadence: 82-90 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 43% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 3:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 43% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 48% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 3min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 48% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 48% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 48% done. 115% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 3:00. Then 24min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 53% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 24 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 58% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 16 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 34 minutes in. 100% at 95-105 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 58% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 1 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 58% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 100%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 72% done. 0 intervals left. 12 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 22min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 42 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 12 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 2:00 at 118%. Empty the tank. You've got 10 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 115-118% FTP, 95-105 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 10 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 115-118% FTP, 95-105 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 48 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 82% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 48 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 82% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
